steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: The line $y=15x+4$ has slope $15$. Since line $s$ is parallel to it, line $s$ also has slope $15$.

steps.title: Evaluate the line through the origin
steps.content:
Line $s$ passes through $(0,0)$, so its equation is $y=15x$. At the point $(5,d)$, substitute $x=5$.
$$d=15(5)=75$$
The answer is C.
